rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Judgment Debtor Anne Kihagis Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax And Or Strike Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANTS ZORIALL LLC and ANNE KIHAGI's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax And/Or Strike Costs is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Strike is DENIED. Costs Bill was submitted for filing on October 16, 2020. The delay in processing of the e-filing is not grounds for motion to strike. Motion to Tax is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show that any part of a lump sum of $1,513 for "filing/serve/CC/courier" is recoverable under Costs Bill and failed to seek these costs by a separate motion. See Notice of Motion filed on October 16, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees As Costs Incurred 10162018 To 03062019 For Enforcement Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2021 line 1. PLAINTIFF DALE DUNCAN and MARTA MUNOZ MENDOZA's Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees As Costs Incurred For Enforcement Of Judgment is GRANTED. Plaintiff is entitled to recovery of post-judgment enforcement fees. The hours spent and hourly rates are reasonable. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGI'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is continued to February 24, 2021 to be heard with other pending motions. The Court notes that Reply brief filed by the defendant on February 1, 2021 indicates February 24, 2021 as the hearing date. The Court further notes that a sur-reply was filed on February 3, 2021; the Court and the parties need time to read and address the filings. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Ordering And Setting Depositions Of Clarice Wright And Loren Morris And Objections Thereto Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Lukasz I. Wozniak In Support Thereto
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANTS FAY SERVICING, LLC and WILMINGTON TRUST's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Ordering And Setting Depositions Of Clarice Wright And Loren Morris is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part in light of the ruling on the motion for protective order. Parties to meet and confer regarding deposition dates and coordinate with the discovery referee. Depositions to proceed based in discovery referee's availability as soon as practicably possible. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Plaintiffs Motion For Sanctions And Objections Thereto
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANTS FAY SERVICING, LLC and WILMINGTON TRUST's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Plaintiffs Motion For Sanctions (filed October 5, 2020) is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part as follows: Motion for Protective order is denied, Ms. Wright and Mr. Morris shall appear for depositions. Parties to arrange for a date of the deposition with the discovery referee, who is to be present at the depositions. Motion for Terminating sanctions is DENIED. The Court will grant issue and evidentiary sanctions. Mr. Goodell shall prepare an order and parties should meet and confer regarding the content of the order re: deposition topics/questions subject to issue and evidentiary sanctions to be submitted to the Court for execution after the depositions of Ms. Wright and Mr. Morris. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2021 line 5. DEFENDANT WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Causes of action alleged in this complaint are dependent on/premature and/or are duplicative re: damages of the causes of action asserted in the consolidated action, e.g. attorney's fees incurred for Public Report and return/cancellation of instruments. Furthermore, Plaintiff fails to allege facts or authority showing her standing to proceed under B&P 11010; duty to disclose or additional viable damages caused by non-disclosure. = (501/CFH)
